response:
"Dear [Supervisor's Name],

I am writing to inform you that I have decided to leave the company. After careful consideration, I have come to the conclusion that I am no longer able to continue working here due to [briefly explain the reason, e.g., personal reasons, career goals, etc.].

I would like to express my gratitude for the opportunities and experiences I have had during my time here. I have learned a lot and grown professionally, and I will always value the support and guidance I received from the team.

I will do my best to ensure a smooth transition and provide any necessary assistance during the notice period. I will also make sure to complete all outstanding tasks and hand over my responsibilities to the designated successor.

Thank you for understanding, and I wish the company continued success.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]"
